Package uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool

package uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts. This package manages the visualization of tool calls and responses, integrating permission controls and execution status feedback into the conversation flow.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part
    Provides base classes and factories for rendering individual parts of an ASI message.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
    Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text
    Provides specialized renderers for different segments of a text message part.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ToolCallPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering an AbstractToolCall and its associated AbstractToolResponse within a model message.
    ToolExecutionStatusRenderer
    A specialized renderer for ToolExecutionStatus enums in JComboBoxes.
    ToolPermissionRenderer
    A specialized renderer for ToolPermission enums in JComboBoxes.
    ToolResponseAttachmentsPanel
    A panel for rendering a list of ToolResponseAttachments.
